stonetop.summary: A confused, furious sliver of the primordial void, called into a world far too loud for it.

system.concept: A confused, furious sliver of the primordial void, called into a world far too loud for it.
system.description: Touch the crown and speak the Words of Being, and a void elemental manifests — a black hole in reality, a primordial thing of the void, confused and angry at all the noise and chaos of the world. It serves as a follower with 3 Loyalty to start, and can gain no more; chant the Words of Unbeing and it may return to the void, if it wants to.
